name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-22
title: Dead code cleanup: workspace-tree.py legacy 2-arg form, sync-check.py _policy_section, scope-guard walk_up_find, install.py file re-parse
description:
Multiple dead-code sites in rabbit-cage:

1. workspace-tree.py:17-21 supports legacy 2-arg 'workspace-tree.py <repo_root> <0|1>' form 'for backward compat'. No caller uses this; pure dead branch.

2. workspace-tree.py:107-108 flags .sh files as key files, but per Inv 39 no .sh runtime files exist in rabbit-cage; branch is unreachable.

3. workspace-tree.py ANNOTATIONS/STRUCTURAL_DIRS lists only older features (rabbit-cage, contract, policy, tdd-subagent, rabbit-file). New feature subdirs (rabbit-feature, rabbit-feature-scope, rabbit-spec) render unannotated. Add them.

4. sync-check.py:90-96,120 _policy_section() and rabbit-policy-start/-end regex: markers were removed from generate-claude-md.py; _policy_section always returns empty. Helper, regex, and section variable are dead.

5. scope-guard.py:177-178 walk_up_find for .rabbit-scope-active walks every ancestor then immediately reads from REPO_ROOT — walk is wasted; collapse to single is_file() check.

6. sync-check.py:281-286 writes '0
' when counter missing then immediately reads back; can be reduced to count = 0.

7. install.py:27-39 usage() re-parses __file__ banner; lift comments into module docstring and use print(__doc__).

8. commands/rabbit-project.md:19 lists 'init → rabbit-project.py' (self-reference); remove.
